creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
I've tried drm kernel module with recent xorg (7.3) and got strange
messages from the kernel logs on module unload:

drmsub0: <Intel i852GM/i855GM GMCH>: (child of agp_i810.c) on agp0
info: [drm] AGP at 0xe8000000 128MB
info: [drm] Initialized i915 1.4.0 20060119
drmsub0: detached
Warning: memory type drm leaked memory on destroy (2 allocations, 64 bytes leaked).

How-To-Repeat: What I did:

1) started xorg (7.3) server
2) it loaded drm module by default
3) killed xorg
4) kldunload i915
